tasks.title: Implement assert.compareArray and assert.arrayContains

tasks.title: Expand SUPPORTED_INCLUDES to Cover More Harness Files

tasks.exit_criteria: The include allowlist in crates/quench-runtime/src/test262/batches.rs admits propertyHelper.js, nativeErrors.js and deepEqual.js, their helpers are registered natively, the 'unsupported include' skip count drops, and the test262 subset pass rate rises.

tasks.title: Map Harness Files to Conformance Areas

tasks.title: Implement trampoline interpreter with explicit call stack
tasks.notes: Architecture. Very high impact, high effort. Replaces recursive AST walker; required to run whole test262 suites.
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Make control flow and this explicit
tasks.notes: `break`/`continue` are propagated via a thread-local flag (`CONTROL_FLOW`), and native `this` is stashed in a thread-local (`CURRENT_THIS`). This breaks composability and conflicts with the HIR design.
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.notes: > **Minimum custom code.** Use the standard ECMAScript object model instead of custom variants.
